photo.label: Picture
photo.description: Upload the category photo customers see on the website

list_position.label: Order on website
list_position.description: 1 = show first, 2 = second, and so on

products.label: Products in this section
products.description: Managed on Product — pick this category there

photo.label: Main picture
photo.description: Upload the product photo customers see on the website

highlight_on_homepage.label: Show on homepage
highlight_on_homepage.description: Tick to feature this product on the homepage

mark_as_new.label: Show "New" badge
mark_as_new.description: Tick if this is a new arrival

category.label: Shop section
category.description: Pick an existing section from the list

sizes_and_colors.label: Sizes & colors
sizes_and_colors.description: Add these under Content → Size & color (pick this product there)

item_code.label: Product code
item_code.description: Short name to recognise this item, e.g. Grey-Hoodie-M

photo.label: Picture
photo.description: Upload a photo for this size and color

price_for_bulk.label: Price per piece when buying many (RWF)
price_for_bulk.description: Leave empty if there is no discount for large orders

min_quantity_for_bulk.label: How many to buy for lower price
min_quantity_for_bulk.description: e.g. 10 means the customer must buy at least 10 to get the lower price

how_many_left.label: How many we have
how_many_left.description: Count how many of this size/color are available to sell

item_code.label: Product code
item_code.description: Short name to recognise this item, e.g. Grey-Hoodie-M

photo.label: Picture
photo.description: Upload a photo for this size and color

price_for_bulk.label: Price per piece when buying many (RWF)
price_for_bulk.description: Leave empty if there is no discount for large orders

min_quantity_for_bulk.label: How many to buy for lower price
min_quantity_for_bulk.description: e.g. 10 means the customer must buy at least 10 to get the lower price

how_many_left.label: How many we have
how_many_left.description: Count how many of this size/color are available to sell

order_status.label: Status
order_status.description: Placed / Pending / Completed = stock goes down · Cancelled = stock goes back

stock_deducted.label: Stock already removed
stock_deducted.description: Set automatically — you do not need to change this

hero_slides.label: Hero carousel
hero_slides.description: Slides at the top of the shop homepage — order matters

hero_secondary_cta.label: Secondary hero button
hero_secondary_cta.description: Shown on every slide, e.g. Bulk pricing

new_arrivals_limit.label: How many new arrivals to show

featured_limit.label: How many featured products to show

style.label: Look
style.description: Brand = red gradient · Dark = dark card

bought_as.label: How they bought
bought_as.description: One piece or many at a lower price
